text: I am surrounded by the spirit of collective inquiry and discovery. The glass walls of the conference room reveal focused people, the haze of blue light a soft boundary between concentration and openness. Moving forward, I am confronted with bold letters—R+D—a declaration of curiosity and technological ambition. Here, I feel an invigorating mix of anticipation and contemplation, as if the future is quietly being shaped nearby, and I am both observer and participant in this evolving interplay between humanity and machines.
